name: conversation mode — processMessage with FAILED provider → ok:true, mode=CONVERSATION_RESPONSE, provider_failed:true (no silent BLOCKED) (PHASE-16 regression guard)
description: RED (before fix): handleConversationMode provider failure returns { ok:false, mode:'BLOCKED' } → ok_true=false, mode_is_conv_response=false → FAIL. GREEN (after fix): provider failure returns user-facing fallback message with ok:true, mode=CONVERSATION_RESPONSE, provider_failed:true → all assertions pass.
